   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig = plt.figure()\n",
    "plt.plot(x, np.sin(x), '-')\n",
    "plt.plot(x, np.cos(x), '--');"
   ]
